seo.title: About this starter
seo.description: A second page — proving dynamic slug routes are enumerated and prerendered.

data.title: A second, statically-prerendered page
data.headline: About
data.description: This page exists only in the CMS. At build time the Nuxt prerender hook enumerates it from the API and emits /about/index.html — no route was hand-written on the frontend.
